Class ExecutionOperationContract

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionOperationContract
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>, IExecutionOperationContract
public class ExecutionOperationContract extends AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement> implements IExecutionOperationContract
The default implementation of IExecutionOperationContract.

    • lazyComputeName

      protected String lazyComputeName() throws ProofInputException
      Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.
      Specified by:
      lazyComputeName in class AbstractExecutionElement
      Returns:
      The human-readable name of this IExecutionNode.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • searchConstructorSelfDefinition

      protected JTerm searchConstructorSelfDefinition(JTerm term, KeYJavaType staticType, Services services)
      Tries to find the self JTerm of the given KeYJavaType.
      Parameters:
      term - The JTerm to start search in.
      staticType - The expected KeYJavaType.
      services - The Services to use.
      Returns:
      The found self JTerm or null if not available.

    • extractResultVariableFromPostBranch

      protected static LocationVariable extractResultVariableFromPostBranch(Node node, Services services)
      Extracts the result variable from the given post branch.
      Parameters:
      node - The Node which is the post or exceptional post branch of an applied ContractRuleApp.
      services - The Services to use.
      Returns:
      The found LocationVariable or null if not found.
